zh.lifeSummary: Peredur ap Ednowain是Ednowain的兒子，出生在威爾士。他於1145年之前與Mrs Peredur ap Ednowain在威爾士結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Peredur ap Ednowain是Ednowain的儿子，出生在威尔士。他于1145年之前与Mrs Peredur ap Ednowain在威尔士结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): habitational name from Apt, the Yiddish name of Opatów in Świętokrzyskie Voivodeship, Poland. The placename (in German, Yiddish, and Polish) is from a root meaning ‘abbot’, the place having been named for the local abbey. Compare   Abt  .

variants.name: Abt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Horst, Johann, Kurt.

German and Dutch: from Middle Low German or Middle Dutch abt ‘abbot’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a servant of an abbot or a nickname for someone thought to resemble an abbot in some way. In some instances it may have been a topographic or habitational name referring to a house named with this word.
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): variant of   Abt  , a habitational name from Opatów in Poland.

variants.name: Apter
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avrohom, Bronya, Eliezer, Naftali.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Apt (see   Apt  ).
English: habitational name from Aptor in Marldon, Devon, composed of Old English uppe ‘up, above’ + torr ‘rocky outcrop’.

en.lifeSummary: Peredur ap Ednowain was born in Wales as the son of Ednowain. He married Mrs Peredur ap Ednowain before 1145, in Wales. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Peredur ap Ednowain est né à Galles, fils d’Ednowain. Il a épousé Mrs Peredur ap Ednowain avant 1145, à Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Peredur ap Ednowain wurde in Wales, als Sohn von Ednowain geboren. Er hat vor 1145 in Wales Mrs Peredur ap Ednowain geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Peredur ap Ednowain è nato il nel Galles come figlio di Ednowain. Lui sposato Mrs Peredur ap Ednowain prima del 1145, nel Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio.

ja.lifeSummary: Peredur ap EdnowainはウェールズでEdnowainの息子として生まれた。1145年以前にウェールズでMrs Peredur ap Ednowainと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Peredur ap Ednowain(은)는 웨일스에서 Ednowain의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1145년 이전 웨일스에서 Mrs Peredur ap Ednowain(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Peredur ap Ednowain nasceu em Gales filho de Ednowain. Ele casou-se com Mrs Peredur ap Ednowain antes 1145, em Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Peredur ap Ednowain родился в местности Уэльс. Его отца звали Ednowain. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs Peredur ap Ednowain перед 1145 г. в местности Уэльс. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Peredur ap Ednowain nació en Gales como hijo de Ednowain. Se casó con Mrs Peredur ap Ednowain antes de 1145, en Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo.
